import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String)
    year = Column(Integer)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"

class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Tires"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String) # Store compatible bicycle models as comma-separated string

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True) #e.g., "S", "M", "L" for helmets

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_name = Column(String)
    customer_email = Column(String)
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    is_shipped = Column(Boolean, default=False)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_name='{self.customer_name}', total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    item_type = Column(String) # "bicycle", "spare_part", "accessory"
    item_id = Column(Integer) # ID of the bicycle, spare part, or accessory
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, item_type='{self.item_type}', item_id={self.item_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

Order.items = relationship("OrderItem", order_by=OrderItem.id, back_populates="order")

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_connection(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_connection(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_item(self, item):
        self.open_connection()
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_connection()

    def delete_item(self, item):
        self.open_connection()
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_connection()

    def update_item(self, item):
        self.open_connection()
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_connection()

    def get_item_by_id(self, item_class, item_id):
        self.open_connection()
        item = self.session.query(item_class).filter_by(id=item_id).first()
        self.close_connection()
        return item

    def get_all_items(self, item_class):
        self.open_connection()
        items = self.session.query(item_class).all()
        self.close_connection()
        return items

    def filter_items(self, item_class, **kwargs):
        self.open_connection()
        query = self.session.query(item_class)
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            query = query.filter(getattr(item_class, key) == value)
        items = query.all()
        self.close_connection()
        return items

    def search_items(self, item_class, search_term, fields):
        self.open_connection()
        filters = []
        for field in fields:
            filters.append(getattr(item_class, field).like(f"%{search_term}%"))
        items = self.session.query(item_class).filter(sqlalchemy.or_(*filters)).all()
        self.close_connection()
        return items

    def create_order(self, customer_name, customer_email, order_items):
        self.open_connection()
        total_amount = sum(item['price'] * item['quantity'] for item in order_items)
        new_order = Order(customer_name=customer_name, customer_email=customer_email, total_amount=total_amount)
        self.session.add(new_order)
        self.session.flush() # Get the order ID before committing

        for item in order_items:
            order_item = OrderItem(order_id=new_order.id, item_type=item['item_type'], item_id=item['item_id'], quantity=item['quantity'], price=item['price'])
            self.session.add(order_item)

            # Update stock quantity
            if item['item_type'] == 'bicycle':
                bicycle = self.session.query(Bicycle).get(item['item_id'])
                bicycle.quantity_in_stock -= item['quantity']
            elif item['item_type'] == 'spare_part':
                spare_part = self.session.query(SparePart).get(item['item_id'])
                spare_part.quantity_in_stock -= item['quantity']
            elif item['item_type'] == 'accessory':
                accessory = self.session.query(Accessory).get(item['item_id'])
                accessory.quantity_in_stock -= item['quantity']

        self.session.commit()
        self.close_connection()
        return new_order

import sqlalchemy

Base = declarative_base()

def add_order_item(session, order_id, bicycle_id=None, spare_part_id=None, accessory_id=None, quantity=1, item_price=None):
    order = get_order_by_id(session, order_id)
    if not order:
        return None

    if bicycle_id:
        item = get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id)
    elif spare_part_id:
        item = get_spare_part_by_id(session, spare_part_id)
    elif accessory_id:
        item = get_accessory_by_id(session, accessory_id)
    else:
        return None

    if not item:
        return None

    if item_price is None:
        item_price = item.price

    order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, bicycle_id=bicycle_id, spare_part_id=spare_part_id, accessory_id=accessory_id, quantity=quantity, item_price=item_price)
    session.add(order_item)

    # Update total amount of the order
    order.total_amount = (order.total_amount or 0) + (quantity * item_price)
    session.commit()
    return order_item

def get_order_item_by_id(session, order_item_id):
    return session.query(OrderItem).filter(OrderItem.id == order_item_id).first()

def update_order_item_quantity(session, order_item_id, new_quantity):
    order_item = get_order_item_by_id(session, order_item_id)
    if order_item:
        order = get_order_by_id(session, order_item.order_id)
        if order:
            # Recalculate total amount
            order.total_amount -= (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            order_item.quantity = new_quantity
            order.total_amount += (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            session.commit()
            return True
    return False

def delete_order_item(session, order_item_id):
    order_item = get_order_item_by_id(session, order_item_id)
    if order_item:
        order = get_order_by_id(session, order_item.order_id)
        if order:
            order.total_amount -= (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            session.delete(order_item)
            session.commit()
            return True
    return False

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String)
    weight_kg = Column(Float)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Tires"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String) # Store compatible bicycle models as comma-separated string

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True) # e.g., "S", "M", "L" for helmets

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    shipping_address = Column(String)
    order_status = Column(String, default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    item_price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

def create_order(session, user_id, order_items):
    """
    Creates a new order.

    Args:
        session: SQLAlchemy session.
        user_id: ID of the user placing the order.
        order_items: A list of dictionaries, where each dictionary represents an order item
                     and contains 'product_id' and 'quantity'.

    Returns:
        The created Order object.
    """
    user = session.query(User).get(user_id)
    if not user:
        raise ValueError(f"User with ID {user_id} not found.")

    total_amount = 0
    order = Order(user=user)
    session.add(order)
    session.flush()  # Assign an ID to the order

    for item_data in order_items:
        product_id = item_data['product_id']
        quantity = item_data['quantity']

        product = session.query(Product).get(product_id)
        if not product:
            session.rollback()
            raise ValueError(f"Product with ID {product_id} not found.")

        if product.in_stock < quantity:
            session.rollback()
            raise ValueError(f"Not enough stock for product {product.name}.  Available: {product.in_stock}, Requested: {quantity}")

        order_item = OrderItem(order=order, product=product, quantity=quantity, price=product.price)
        session.add(order_item)
        total_amount += product.price * quantity
        product.in_stock -= quantity

    order.total_amount = total_amount
    session.commit()
    return order

def get_order(session, order_id):
    return session.query(Order).get(order_id)

def update_order_status(session, order_id, new_status):
    order = get_order(session, order_id)
    if order:
        order.status = new_status
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_order(session, order_id):
    order = get_order(session, order_id)
    if order:
        session.delete(order)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

    def __init__(self, db_url):

        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_connection(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_connection(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add(self, item):
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def delete(self, item):
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def modify(self, item):
        self.session.commit()

    def get_by_id(self, model, item_id):
        return self.session.query(model).get(item_id)

    def get_all(self, model):
        return self.session.query(model).all()

    def filter(self, model, *args):
        return self.session.query(model).filter(*args).all()

    def search(self, model, search_term, *columns):
        """
        Searches for items in the specified model where any of the given columns
        contain the search term (case-insensitive).
        """
        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"
        filters = [column.like(search_term) for column in columns]
        return self.session.query(model).filter(sqlalchemy.or_(*filters)).all()

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class Component(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'components'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)

    price = Column(Float)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(quantity={self.quantity}, item_price={self.item_price})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_session(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_session(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_item(self, item):
        self.open_session()
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_session()

    def delete_item(self, item):
        self.open_session()
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_session()

    def modify_item(self, item_id, table_class, **kwargs):
        self.open_session()
        item = self.session.query(table_class).get(item_id)
        if item:
            for key, value in kwargs.items():
                setattr(item, key, value)
            self.session.commit()
        else:
            print(f"Item with id {item_id} not found in table {table_class.__tablename__}")
        self.close_session()

    def select_items(self, table_class, filters=None):
        self.open_session()
        query = self.session.query(table_class)
        if filters:
            query = query.filter(*filters)
        items = query.all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def search_items(self, table_class, search_term, fields):
        self.open_session()
        filters = []
        for field in fields:
            column = getattr(table_class, field)
            filters.append(column.like(f"%{search_term}%"))

        items = self.session.query(table_class).filter(sqlalchemy.or_(*filters)).all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

        # Create some components
        component1 = Component(name='Shimano XT Brakes', brand='Shimano', component_type='Brakes', price=150.00, stock_quantity=20)

        # Add the objects to the session
        session.add_all([bike1, bike2, component1, component2, attachment1, attachment2, customer1])

        # Create bike-component and bike-attachment relationships
        bike_component1 = BikeComponent(bike=bike1, component=component1, quantity=2)
        bike_attachment1 = BikeAttachment(bike=bike1, attachment=attachment1, quantity=1)
        session.add_all([bike_component1, bike_attachment1])

        # Create an order
        order1 = Order(customer=customer1, shipping_address='456 Oak Ave', shipping_city='Anytown', shipping_state='CA', shipping_zip_code='91234', total_amount=bike1.price)
        session.add(order1)

        # Create an order item
        order_item1 = OrderItem(order=order1, bike=bike1, quantity=1, price=bike1.price)
        session.add(order_item1)

        # Commit the changes
        session.commit()
        print("Data added successfully!")

    except Exception as e:
        session.rollback()
        print(f"Error adding data: {e}")

    # 3. Querying Data
    try:

            session.commit()
            print("\nComponent stock updated successfully!")

    except Exception as e:
        session.rollback()
        print(f"Error updating data: {e}")

    try:

            session.commit()
            print("\nBike deleted successfully!")
        else:
            print("\nBike not found.")

    except Exception as e:
        session.rollback()
        print(f"Error deleting data: {e}")

        session.close()

import sqlalchemy

Base = declarative_base()

class Bike(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bikes'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)

    brand = Column(String(255), nullable=False)

    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    components = relationship("BikeComponent", back_populates="bike")
    attachments = relationship("BikeAttachment", back_populates="bike")
    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bike")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bike(model_name='{self.model_name}', brand='{self.brand}', price={self.price})>"

        session.rollback()
        print(f"Error updating data: {e}")

    try:

        bike_to_delete = session.query(Bike).filter(Bike.model_name == 'Road Racer 2000').first()

            print("\nBike not found.")

    except Exception as e:
        session.rollback()
        print(f"Error deleting data: {e}")

    finally:

        session.close()

def add_bike_attachment(session, bike_id, attachment_id, quantity=1):
    """Adds an attachment to a bike."""
    new_bike_attachment = BikeAttachment(bike_id=bike_id, attachment_id=attachment_id, quantity=quantity)
    session.add(new_bike_attachment)
    session.commit()
    return new_bike_attachment


def get_bike_by_id(session, bike_id):
    """Retrieves a bike by its ID."""
    return session.query(Bike).filter(Bike.id == bike_id).first()


def get_component_by_id(session, component_id):
    """Retrieves a component by its ID."""
    return session.query(Component).filter(Component.id == component_id).first()


def get_attachment_by_id(session, attachment_id):
    """Retrieves an attachment by its ID."""
    return session.query(Attachment).filter(Attachment.id == attachment_id).first()


def update_bike_quantity(session, bike_id, new_quantity):
    """Updates the quantity of a bike in stock."""
    bike = get_bike_by_id(session, bike_id)
    if bike:
        bike.quantity_in_stock = new_quantity
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False


def update_component_quantity(session, component_id, new_quantity):
    """Updates the quantity of a component in stock."""
    component = get_component_by_id(session, component_id)
    if component:
        component.quantity_in_stock = new_quantity
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False


def update_attachment_quantity(session, attachment_id, new_quantity):
    """Updates the quantity of an attachment in stock."""
    attachment = get_attachment_by_id(session, attachment_id)
    if attachment:
        attachment.quantity_in_stock = new_quantity
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False


def delete_bike(session, bike_id):
    """Deletes a bike from the database."""
    bike = get_bike_by_id(session, bike_id)
    if bike:
        session.delete(bike)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False


def delete_component(session, component_id):
    """Deletes a component from the database."""
    component = get_component_by_id(session, component_id)
    if component:
        session.delete(component)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False


def delete_attachment(session, attachment_id):
    """Deletes an attachment from the database."""
    attachment = get_attachment_by_id(session, attachment_id)
    if attachment:
        session.delete(attachment)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False


def find_bikes_by_brand(session, brand):
    """Finds bikes by brand."""
    return session.query(Bike).filter(Bike.brand == brand).all()


def find_components_by_type(session, component_type):
    """Finds components by type."""
    return session.query(Component).filter(Component.component_type == component_type).all()


def find_attachments_by_type(session, attachment_type):
    """Finds attachments by type."""
    return session.query(Attachment).filter(Attachment.attachment_type == attachment_type).all()
